message:
refactor(tests): Use is_ok_and instead of map_or for Result checking

Replace `.map_or(false, |res| res.is_some())` with the more idiomatic
`.is_ok_and(|res| res.is_some())` which clearly expresses the intent:
"returns true if Ok and the contained value satisfies the predicate"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
